top_signals.title: Apple blocked over $11 billion in App Store fraud in 6 years
top_signals.summary: Apple revealed that it blocked over $11 billion in fraudulent App Store transactions over the last six years, more than $2.2 billion in potentially fraudulent App Store transactions in 2025 alone. [...]
